introSection: Gold Mine is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Spanish manufacturer Robles Bouso Atracciones currently located at PPS Park Platja d'Aro in Platja d'Aro, Girona, Catalonia, Spain.
fullText: Gold Mine is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Spanish manufacturer Robles Bouso Atracciones currently located at PPS Park Platja d'Aro in Platja d'Aro, Girona, Catalonia, Spain.
